title: DIR Division of Apprenticeship Standards - Minimum Ratios

indexed_extract.summary: DIR explains the 1:5 minimum ratio and notes craft/program-specific exemptions, including Northern California Operating Engineers 1:4.
key_points: Minimum ratio is 5 journeymen hours to 1 apprentice hour per craft, straight time only.
Specific programs may have different maximum/minimum ratios.
Northern California Operating Engineers example uses 1 apprentice for each 4 journeymen.

notes: Important for modeling craft-specific ratio overrides separately from default rule.
